creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Tue, March 4, 2008 12:25 am, Johan Granath wrote:

I am not sure whether this had been asked already or not : can you please
give us a verbose boot output (select that during bootup, or issue a boot
-v) and a pciconf -vl so that we can at least see what kind of hardware
you are using.

Thanks,
remko
